title: nasa bicornuta
side_effects: Nasa bicornuta can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant can lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting due to its high alkaloid content. In rare cases, excessive consumption of Nasa bicornuta can cause heart palpitations, respiratory distress, and even seizures in susceptible individuals. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
